title: Gently Roasted Croatian Potato Roast
description: A sweet and shaggy Croatian dish featuring potato buns and roast, perfect for a light and comforting meal, this vegan-friendly recipe is a great option for those looking for a hearty and satisfying dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes, onion, carrots, and bell pepper with the olive oil, paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
While the vegetables are roasting, toast the potato buns by baking them in the oven for 5 minutes, or until they are lightly browned.
Once the vegetables are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Spread a layer of tomato paste on each potato bun, then top with a spoonful of the roasted vegetables.
Serve the potato roast hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
